raw: This pass provides free admission for up to 5 people, one pass per party. The museum is open daily 10-5. The ship is open Wednesday - Sunday 10-4. Check https://ussconstitutionmuseum.org/ for more information. The pass will be emailed to you and can be printed or shown on your device at time of visit. Contact 978-373-1586 x603 with any questions.
